title: malaxis lamii
intro: Malaxis lamii, also known as the Lamium orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Malaxis lamii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Malaxis lamii can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, or ointments, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
